VALUES (
  'teste5-local-openid',
  'teste5',
  'teste5@pacsml.com.br',
  'responsavel_financeiro',
  'teste5',
  '$2b$12$dFvYWbHXOSAzoTu.L1qccuR.7.Lv6pqb2yK0kqx/d3v9yhpQNsqZq',
  1,
  210001,
  'local'
);

-- 2. Verificar o ID gerado
SELECT id, name, role, username FROM users WHERE username = 'teste5';
